M
Operations AI · Categories
High confidenceVelocity + FinanceSynced just now
Capital trap
Decor holds 29% of capital but turns 11% of it
$247K is locked in your slowest-moving category — an 18-point gap between cash held and cash working. The clearest place to free up capital.
Starved winner
Accessories turns 24% on just 9% of capital
Your fastest category is under-funded — it could absorb more inventory and turn it. Reallocating from Decor here is the highest-return move.
Rebalance
Shifting $80K Decor → Accessories frees trapped cash
Drawing down the slow Decor overhang and funding the starved fast category rebalances roughly $80K toward working capital.

Capital lens
Click a category to see how much capital it holds, how fast that capital turns, and whether it’s trapping cash or starving for it — then rebalance via the Bridge.
